appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance section for agent-browser surface covering isolation rules, resources, test setup, screenshot guidelines, and known UI behaviors for foundation milestone.
Added known constraint about engine.symbols iteration: QuerySymbolsProxy does not have .items() - must use 'for name in engine.symbols:' and then engine.symbols[name].

Fixed bug in _build_schema method: engine.symbols.items() fails because QuerySymbolsProxy does not have an items() method. Changed to 'for name in engine.symbols:' with 'symbol = engine.symbols[name]' inside the loop.

notes: All 8 foundation assertions passed. A bug was discovered and fixed in v2_handlers.py where the schema endpoint was calling engine.symbols.items() which does not exist on QuerySymbolsProxy. Fixed to use iteration over symbol names. Minor friction: after engine selection, the predicate browser in the sidebar still shows 'Engine not selected' - this is expected behavior for the foundation milestone as the predicate browser is a query-builder milestone feature. The main content area correctly shows engine context after selection.
